title: New Youth Hub in Telford - Shaun Davies MP
meta_description: Support my call for a new Youth Hub in Telford. More than 30% of Telford’s population are young people under the age of 24. headings: h3: New Youth Hub in Telford
h2: Support my call for a new Youth Hub in Telford.
h3: Let me know your thoughts by filling out this survey:
text_excerpt: New Youth Hub in Telford - Shaun Davies MP Shaun.Davies.MP@Parliament.uk 01952 973 714 Home My Work Work Experience latest News Events About Me Contact CONTACT Home My Work Work Experience latest News Events About Me Contact New Youth Hub in Telford April 17, 2026 Support my call for a new Youth Hub in Telford. More than 30% of Telford’s population are young people under the age of 24. I know from speaking to young people, parents and businesses in our area how important it is that everyone gets the opportunity to succeed in the world of work. It’s critical for young people themselves and it’s critical for a thriving local economy. The new youth hubs are single location with Jobcentre services, council support, employers and training under one roof. The Government has announced plans to deliver 80 new Youth Hubs across the UK, including one for Telford & Wrekin. This is part of a national mission to ensure every area has access to opportunities in work, training and volunteering. I am pushing to ensure that Telford is the location for our local Youth Hub. This is a significant opportunity for our town, and I want to make sure Telford’s young people benefit directly from this investment. I want every child and young person in Telford to have the best possible start in life and the opportunity to thrive. Youth Hubs bring together employment support, the local authority, employers and training providers in one place, offering joined-up support at a crucial stage in young people’s lives. Securing this Youth Hub for Telford would make a real and lasting difference to opportunity, skills and life chances across our community. Let me know your thoughts by filling out this survey: Do you support Shaun’s call for a new youth hub in Telford? Yes No Not sure Name Email Postcode Address Any other comments about youth services in Telford you would like to share with your MP By submitting this form you are agreeing for Shaun Davies MP to keep you updated via letter, email and texts on the latest campaigns, events and democratic engagement opportunities. You can manage your preferences or unsubscribe at any time. Please contact the office of Shaun Davies MP. shaun.davies.mp@parliament.uk To ensure GDPR compliance, where 'no' is selected, your data will be processed with the express purpose of delivering the content you have signed up for, for example, but not limited to: communications from Shaun Davies MP and the Labour Party - you will receive no further communications from Shaun Davies MP. No, I do not want to receive updates or further communication. Share Standing up for Telford As your MP for Telford, Shaun’s guiding principle in Parliament is to tirelessly fight for his hometown and continue to demand the return of health services to our PRH. Shaun is also committed to supporting residents and raising their concerns with those in power.
